name: Welcome
description: Create a customizable welcome message/embed for new members, with a prefix test command.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.descriptionTemplate:
Hey {mention}, we are happy to have you here.

You are member **#{member_count}**.
Account created: `{account_created}`
defaults.permissionMessage: You need Manage Server permission to test the welcome message.
defaults.missingChannelMessage: Welcome channel not found. Add a channel ID in the Welcome node.
